I need a place to meltdown about this Endfield gacha system oh my god
I've finally actually run the maths through on it and my conclusion is that the game is set up to brick most accounts because the devs are eating paint for breakfast
It's a bad spark system and a bad hoyo clone system mashed together and then made even worse via another layer of slop on top in its weapon system
If you start an account day one in that game, your best option is to not pull at all until you hit _320 pulls banked_
That's probably over six hundred dollars in pulls!
It's 320 because that's how many pulls it takes to actually guarantee a limited weapon on a fresh account. Limited weapons are only bought with _pity currency_.

So you have to bank enough pity currency, and to guarantee that you need to bank 320 pulls. 

The catch? Well, you actually get a better rate on pity currency if you pull _on the standard banner_.

I am _never complaining about wheel jail in Morimens ever after seeing this system_
Endfield is a game where you can accidentally brick your account because you pulled the limited character you wanted on the first pull of a banner. I've never seen a system worse.
why not just use an alternative weapon or sum <:Jointhefun2:1400771643743408210>
That's my feeling, but ... this is a gacha game
Guarantees don't carry over, even on the weapon banner. So you're gambling if you don't have the guarantee on the weapon banner. To get the guarantee, you need to start from a place of 320 pulls.
So either the weapon banner's limited weapons are a trap, which I am now really hoping is permanently the case, or the game has like, Cygames levels of cost associated with it
how is the given pulls then? is it abundant as much as it wants from players?
CBT1 had an endgame mode that gave weapon gacha currency

I remember a gacha game where your chance to get a unit you want is determined by how many pulls
With like 100 pulls raising the chance by 10%

the gotta go either of 2 routes:
be like those gachas that premium currency is given basically like bread, and you actually use it for much more than just pulling
fix the fucking pity lmao
And absolute hard pity being 1000 pulls or some shenanigans
But you can't fix this sort of gacha system with free pulls. It makes it so hard for anybody without a degree to figure out if they should pull or not that it just turns players away
Thank god Morimens is so simple
im talking about those gachas where you get the premium currency consistently

i mean, its still so dupe dependant
so yeah if you get flooded with premium currency and then pull on the limited banner, you're still pulling wrong
It's dupe dependent but it's much more even and fair
so in Endfield right, you have the limited banner, which is

at most 80 - guaranteed coinflip, soft pity starts at 65
at most 120 - guaranteed limited
each 240 - spark
but that's not how the standard banner is
the standard banner is just soft 65 hard 80 forever
so... it actually gives you more pity currency

it's actually better to pull on the standard banner if you want limited weapons for the characters you can't get because they're only on the limited banner
